ops.title: Remove cc-present's vestigial GuardEditCmd wiring
ops.description: The channelsetup audit (2026-07-17) flagged cc-present as wiring cc-interact's GuardEditCmd without an edit-gating domain need (vestigial substrate wiring). Verify it is genuinely unused in cc-present's flow and remove the wiring (repo rule: if unused, delete it). Note-only finding.

ops.text: cc-present's GuardEditCmd wiring is confirmed unused (hooks, skills, and plugin manifest checked) and removed — or confirmed used and the task closed with the evidence
